series_metadata.series_title: Work Activities and Data Reporting Inquires
series_metadata.series_description: Review and assessment of county services provided to eligible recipients under the Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF), Ohio Works First (OWF), Food Assistance (FA). Maintain record of all Q&A, technical assistance, program or process reviews and data reporting materials related to the TANF/OWF and Food Assistance programs under the work activity and data reporting unit.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office completed, audit reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: in office completed, audit reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved
